targets.rawSql: WITH daily AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', cc.created_at) AS day, MAX(CASE WHEN sc.key='reliability' THEN cc.value END) AS reliability, MAX(CASE WHEN sc.key='maintainability' THEN cc.value END) AS maintainability, MAX(CASE WHEN sc.key='functional_suitability' THEN cc.value END) AS functional_suitability FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic sc ON sc.id = cc.characteristic_id GROUP BY 1) SELECT 'reliability' AS "Característica", ROUND(CORR(reliability, reliability)::numeric,4) AS "Corr Reliability", ROUND(CORR(reliability, maintainability)::numeric,4) AS "Corr Maintainability", ROUND(CORR(reliability, functional_suitability)::numeric,4) AS "Corr Func Suitability" FROM daily UNION ALL SELECT 'maintainability', ROUND(CORR(maintainability, reliability)::numeric,4), ROUND(CORR(maintainability, maintainability)::numeric,4), ROUND(CORR(maintainability, functional_suitability)::numeric,4) FROM daily UNION ALL SELECT 'functional_suitability', ROUND(CORR(functional_suitability, reliability)::numeric,4), ROUND(CORR(functional_suitability, maintainability)::numeric,4), ROUND(CORR(functional_suitability, functional_suitability)::numeric,4) FROM daily

SELECT src.name AS "Origem", tgt.name AS "Alvo", bm.relation_type AS "Tipo", CASE WHEN bm.relation_type = '+' THEN 'Aumentar A tende a aumentar B' ELSE 'Aumentar A tende a diminuir B' END AS "Interpretação" FROM characteristics_balancematrix bm JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic src ON src.id = bm.source_characteristic_id JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic tgt ON tgt.id = bm.target_characteristic_id ORDER BY src.name, bm.relation_type

SELECT r.name AS "Repositório", ROUND(AVG(t.value)::numeric,4) AS "TSQMI Médio", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sc.key='reliability' THEN cc.value END)::numeric,4) AS "Reliability Média", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sc.key='maintainability' THEN cc.value END)::numeric,4) AS "Maintainability Média", ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sc.key='functional_suitability' THEN cc.value END)::numeric,4) AS "Func. Suitability Média", ROUND(STDDEV(t.value)::numeric,4) AS "Volatilidade (σ TSQMI)" FROM tsqmi_tsqmi t JOIN organizations_repository r ON r.id = t.repository_id LEFT JOIN characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc ON cc.repository_id = r.id LEFT JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic sc ON sc.id = cc.characteristic_id GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Dispersão TSQMI vs Média das Características (por repositório)
